title: ItemTag
description: Permanent potion effects, Conditional commands on items, Custom items, ItemEdit addon
body:
🏷️ ItemTag – Extend Item Behavior Beyond Vanilla

ItemTag lets you give Minecraft items new powers by attaching custom behaviors and restrictions. Perfect for RPG servers, adventure maps, and creative plugin developers looking to go beyond the vanilla item system.

✨ Main Command

  • /itemtag (/it) – Add non-vanilla behavior to any item:
    • Execute commands when items are used (e.g. right-clicked)
    • Run commands when items are consumed (food, drinks, potions)
    • Make items uncraftable, unplaceable, or unrenamable
    • Disable smelting or enchanting on certain items

🛠️ Features

  • Apply Potion Effects while wearing equipment
  • Trigger commands on right-click, consume, or interaction
  • Restrict item interactions:
    • Unplaceable
    • Unusable in crafting
    • Unrenamable in anvil
    • Much more...

💡 User-Friendly Experience

  • Tab-completion for faster typing
  • Clickable help messages with hover descriptions
  • Client language based messages, over 10 languages already included
  • Designed with simplicity in mind

🔗 Requirements

  • ✅ ItemEdit (required)
  • ✅ NBTAPI (for Minecraft 1.8.x – 1.13.x)

📚 Learn More

  • 🎥 Spanish Video Tutorial: Watch on YouTube
  • 🤝 Join the Community: Discord Support
